title: Link Text Column to Text Widget
excerpt: It would be great to connect the Text Widget in the dashboard to a Text or Long Text column to get better visibility for the those with long text. For example, we use the text field for goal statements and problem statem…

posts.author: pjimenez (Pedro Jimenez)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to connect the Text Widget in the dashboard to a Text or Long Text column to get better visibility for the those with long text. For example, we use the text field for goal statements and problem statements. I think this would look nice in a project dashboard as a refresher and visibility on important project information and for stakeholders to quickly review instead of having to dig through the column and click on the cell.

posts.author: brieyost (Brie)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking for the same solution. Currently in Work Management, but soon to add monday dev to my account. maybe this is a feature built in to dev? in the sprints board I have the sprint goal text column, and would like to have the cell in the corresponding sprint appear in a dashboard text widget. there are ways to work around this right now by using a table widget, but it’s clunky and doesn’t have a nice way to display the text because of the row height limitations.
